verses.text: Elihu in a thugen zomlai a
“Lungduai takin tawmkhat hong ngailai in. Pasian' tangin ka gen ding thu pawlkhat omlai hi
Kei a hong Piangsak Pasian thuman hi, ci-in kong lahna dingin thu tampi tak kaikhawmin ka hong gen ding hi
Ka thugente khempeuh a khial om hetlo a, na mai-ah thugenpa pen mipil khat ahi hi
“Pasian a thahat mahmah hi napi-in, kuamah simmawhlo hi. Amah in a theihloh bangmah omlo hi
Amah in mimawhte daupaisak lo a, a zawng gimna a thuakte tungah a manin a gamta hi
Amah in thuman mite hu a, kumpi ukna za zong pia a, pahtawina lianpi a ngahsak tawntung hi
Ahi zongin mite sikkol kibulh a, a gamtatnasate hangin gimna a thuak uh leh
Pasian in amau' mawhna leh a kiphatsaknate uh a lakkhia ahi hi
A gamtatsiatna panun a khawlna dingun amau' bil sungah thu a gengen hi
Amaute in Pasian' thu mangin ama na sem le uh amaute nuamsa-in a khan' uh a sau hi
Ahi zongin ama thu mang kei le uh, namsau tawh si ding uh a, misite' gam zuan ding uh hi
“Migilote a hehin nitum uh a, gimna a thuak ciang nangawnun ama huh ding ngenlo uh hi
Amaute khan'sih uh a, a zumhuaipi-in a bei uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in gimna tawh mite thuhilh a, khua a phawktheihna dingun gimna a zang ahi hi
Pasian in lungkhamna panin nang hong paikhiatpihin, lungnuam takin nang hong omsak a, na sabuai tungah anlim nono kilui venvan hi
Ahi zongin tu-in na ngah dinga kilawm gimna a thuakta na hi hi
Sumgolh' khemsa-in gamta kei in la, leitung nate' bawlin lam kipialsak kei in
Huh ding na nget hangin a phattuamna om nawnlo a, na hauhna na liatna in hong huh thei nawnlo hi
Mihingte a beimang hun ding, zan khuamial hong tun' hun ding lunggulh kei in
Siatna lamah na kihei khaklohna ding limtakin kidawm in. Na siat khaklohna dingin gimna hong kithuaksak ahi hi
“Pasian a vangliat mahmahna limtakin phawktel in. Pasian pen sia khempeuh lakah sia lianpen ahi hi
Pasian' gamtatzia ding kuamah in sawl theilo a, Pasian gamtatsia hi, ci-in kuamah in zong mawhsak zolo hi
Pasian a nasepna hangin mi khempeuh in a phat tawntung mah bangin nang zong amah phatzaw in
Mi khempeuh in Pasian' sepsate mu uh a, theikim zolo uh ahih manin lamdang a sa uh hi
Pasian a liatna a kicingin i theizo kei a, ama kum phazah zong i simzo kei hi
“Amah in tuipi panin tuite lato a, tua a lak tuite guahtui-in a bawl hi
Amah in meii sung panin guah piangsak a, mihing khempeuh-a' dingin guah a zusak hi
Meiite a pai henhanna hita leh, vanah van a gin'na hita leh kuamah in thei zolo hi
Amah in vantungah khua phiasak a, ahi zongin tuipi thuk sung a mialsak hi
Amah in tu-a bangin mihingte hong vak a, annek ding tampi tak a hong pia ahi hi
Amah in keek thu pia a, a kap nop penpen a kha dingin a sawl hi
Amah a heh ciangin huihpi sam a, vanging pen ama hong paina ding a kitheihna ahi hi.
